{{Quote|You fools, don't you know who I am? I am Eritha, daughter of Ewane. Contact my sister Alani right this minute. We are helping the Absolutes, you idiots!|Eritha|<ref name="Jedi Apprentice: The Death of Hope">''[[Jedi Apprentice: The Death of Hope]]''</ref>}}
''' Eritha ''' was a [[Gender/Legends|female]] [[Human/Legends|human]] who was the daughter of [[Ewane]] and twin sister of [[Alani]].

==Biography==
Eritha was born in [[57 BBY/Legends|57 BBY]] on [[New Apsolon/Legends|New Apsolon]]. At this time a totalitarian system of government ruled the planet. The [[Civilized]] received all the benefits, while the [[Workers]] lived in poverty. Alani's father, Ewane, was a leader of the resistance against this social system. Due to this activity he spent many years in the prison and saw his daughters rarely. Alani and Eritha were raised mostly by friends of their father, since their mother had died around the time they were born. One of those friends was [[Lenz]]

With the first elections after the fall of the regime in the year [[47 BBY/Legends|47 BBY]] their father was selected to be [[Supreme Governor]] of New Apsolon. At that time the [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knights]] were sent to supervise the election, and they were represented by [[Qui-Gon Jinn/Legends|Qui-Gon Jinn]] and [[Tahl]], who developed a bond with Eritha and her sister Alani.

Ewane held the office for five years, but was murdered shortly into his second term. [[Roan]], a close friend of their father and his successor, adopted them. At that time Alani and Eritha conceived a plan to gain the power on New Apsolon. That plan included killing Roan and kidnapping Tahl, who died as a result of the injuries suffered. However, the plan failed in no small part due to the actions of Qui-Gon Jinn and [[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Obi-Wan Kenobi]] who came to New Apsolon looking for the missing Tahl. After the failed plan, both Alani and Eritha, along with their associate [[Balog (Human)|Balog]] were arrested.
